name: Select Equal Subpositions
short: Select all notes at the same bar position in one shortcut. Three modes. Humanize-aware.
features: Three modes: All Notes, Same Pitch Any, Same Pitch Exact
Works in all display modes (Bars, Seconds, Samples, Frames)
Safe-fail: restores selection if nothing found

faq.q: Does it work with humanized MIDI?
faq.a: Yes. Smart tolerance catches humanized notes up to +/-50 ticks.
Detects time signature at the selected note's position. Bars display mode gives best accuracy for non-standard signatures.
All sales are final for digital downloads. If the product doesn't work as described, contact support within 14 days.
Yes, all future updates included at no extra cost.

faq.q: Can I use it on multiple machines?
faq.a: Yes, install on all computers you personally own and use.
Studio One Professional and Artist editions that support scripts.

notes: Note-based BPB fallback for non-Bars display modes
Three modes: All Notes, Same Pitch Any, Same Pitch Exact
Bar 0000 compatibility fix for Apple Silicon
